0.3_disconnect_not_stop_per_runner.runtime_wire: FULL. Reconciler _breaker_tick now sums current_equity across active specs via get_engine_status and feeds it into FallbackBreaker.evaluate(open_notional, current_equity); revokes DEV-04a-BREAKER-DRAWDOWN-EQUITY-DEFER. Additional bug caught by long-run test: cascading flatten per tick after trip was fixed via was_frozen gate (DEV-04b-BREAKER-FLATTEN-IDEMPOTENCE). State snapshot publisher landed as engine-agnostic core module (custos-side push complete).

NT per-order intent interception hook (DEV-04a-CAP-ENFORCEMENT-HOOK-DEFER) remains v1 pre-live follow-up — cap decision layer is runtime-wire, intercept layer is not.

0.4_money_decimal.runtime_wire: EngineStatus dataclass constructor runs _reject_float_money (raises TypeError on float in Decimal-declared money fields). NT-side impl Decimal(str(...)) reconstructs positions/orders/equity end-to-end. state_snapshot publisher wire serialises str(Decimal) — every wire money field is a JSON string.

lesson_15_no_tracking_numbers.evidence: Zero `Plan NN` / `Task NN` / commit-hash refs introduced in 04b source. `lesson #N` references retained (existing 04a precedent for style; commit messages and plan md carry the tracking numbers, not source).

lesson_17_failure_mode_coverage.evidence: 13 net-new failure-mode tests including relaxed-doubles (`test_both_hosts_still_isinstance_after_snapshot_methods` proves the extended protocol is a live guard); long-run chaos (`test_arx_disconnect_long_run_guards_persist`) is the explicit non-happy-path assertion.

lesson_21_no_silent_path.evidence: state_snapshot publisher's probe+publish paths both wrapped in try/except that logs structlog (state_snapshot_probe_failed / state_snapshot_publish_failed) before returning; reconciler _breaker_tick equity probe failure logs breaker_equity_probe_failed and degrades to notional-only (safer than skipping whole tick).

lesson_22_28_multilayer_independent.evidence: Drawdown breach layer independent from notional layer via test_breaker_trips_on_drawdown_during_arx_disconnect (large max_notional so trip fires on drawdown alone); FallbackBreaker._breaker_tick idempotence fix proved by long-run chaos requiring guards persist independently across 60 ticks.

lesson_25_no_fabricated_tests.evidence: 35 contract-table names grep-verified each = 1; 12 04b-added test names likewise verified; count matches plan §失败模式覆盖契约表 total (P=4 existing + Q≈33 NEW). PASS gate.

lesson_26_boundary_subject.evidence: state_snapshot subject built via build_subject(tenant, 'snapshot', 'state', runner_id, spec_id) — no raw f-string. `_subject` method routes through build_subject so an empty tenant/runner/spec raises rather than silently routing to `arx.tenant.snapshot.state.`

lesson_27_commit_scope.evidence: Every commit prefaced with `git status --short` + `git add <specific-file>`; no `git add .` or `-A`. Pre-commit hook `check-code-english.py` blocked 2 CJK slips (T2.2 module + test docstring) which were rewritten before landing — that is the hook working as designed, not a scope-discipline breach.

lesson_34_worktree_state_check.evidence: N/A — no external teammate messages received during 04b execution; all work performed in-branch custos/04b/runner without inter-agent coordination.

lesson_39_worktree_boundary.evidence: All 6 commits + close-out marker in-branch custos/04b/runner; no `git checkout main`, no push, no amend of prior commits. Close-out marker under .forge/dispatch-log/2026-07-04b-05b-execute-team-packet/ within worktree.

lesson_40_close_out_three_layer.evidence: red_line_gate_satisfaction above declares code_coverage vs runtime_wire vs defer_status per red line; 0.3 explicitly flips from partial (04a) → full (04b) runtime-wire with the drawdown feed live; defer_status names the two remaining out-of-scope items (arx-side consumer migration external to repo; NT per-order intercept hook v1 follow-up).

deviations.note: EngineStatus gained current_equity: Decimal field beyond the plan's drafter Tier-2 sketch (which had peak_equity + drawdown_pct only). Reconciler drawdown wire flip requires feeding current_equity into FallbackBreaker.evaluate; deriving current from peak_equity * (1 - drawdown_pct/100) was rejected as precision-lossy + awkward. Impact: docs/design/engine_protocol.md Tier-2 dataclass block updated to reflect actual shape; state_snapshot publisher + reconciler _breaker_tick consume it directly.

Long-run chaos exposed cascading flatten_positions per tick after trip (breaker.evaluate returns tripped=True on every over-ceiling tick, even after freeze). Fix: reconciler _breaker_tick now captures was_frozen = self.fallback_breaker.frozen before evaluate; skips flatten dispatch when was_frozen == True. Structured log fallback_breaker_tripped (breaker-side) still fires once at trip; fallback_breaker_flatten (reconciler-side) also once. Existing single-tick test test_breaker_trips_during_arx_disconnect unaffected.

tests/core/test_arx_disconnect_chaos.py::_ChaosHost gained a get_engine_status stub returning zero-valued EngineStatus. Rationale: drawdown wire flip means reconciler now calls get_engine_status in _breaker_tick; without the stub the chaos host would silently degrade to notional-only via the equity-probe exception path (correct but obscures test intent). Stub keeps the test asserting notional_breach while validating the get_engine_status call succeeds.

deferred_from_plan_scope: arx sidecar HTTP → NATS state snapshot consumer migration — external to custos independent repo; belongs to an arx-project follow-up plan.
NT per-order intent interception hook (DEV-04a-CAP-ENFORCEMENT-HOOK-DEFER) — cap decision layer runtime-wire complete; intercept-layer wire remains a v1 pre-live plan candidate.
self_reflect_round_1: Re-read every commit at 04b HEAD (git show d99bd23 726619c b5b3ef9 aec6a08 951b9ad c4086f2) against the marker's claims. Verified: (a) Every one of the 35 contract-table test names exists in tests/ via `grep -rn 'def <name>'` = 1 (lesson #25 gate PASS). (b) Reconciler _breaker_tick actually calls both get_open_notional AND get_engine_status per active spec (grep confirmed at deployment_reconciler.py L296-306) — the drawdown wire flip is real, not just a docstring change. (c) EngineStatus._reject_float_money runtime invariant fires on float via test_snapshot_dataclasses_reject_float_money (pytest -k reject_float_money confirms). (d) was_frozen gate at deployment_reconciler.py L322-326 correctly reads `.frozen` state before evaluate and skips the flatten dispatch on subsequent ticks; long-run chaos asserts single flatten call across 60 ticks. (e) state_snapshot publisher publishes via build_subject (grep 'build_subject' src/custos/core/state_snapshot.py = 1); no raw f-string subject construction. (f) `.forge/README.md` Plan 04 row status now reads ✅ Completed with the correct commit-range narrative. All assertions in this marker are backed by grep / test evidence at HEAD c4086f2; no hallucinated claims.
